overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic neon-lit city highway, transitioning to on-foot exploration of covered walkways and pedestrian plazas beneath elevated highways. The scene features distinctive cyberpunk architecture with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with futuristic city skyline view

agents.ego_description: driving along the multi-lane highway toward the neon-lit city center, maintaining steady speed alongside other traffic

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: tall concrete divider separating the highway lanes with red reflective strips
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents against the dusk sky
massive concrete overpass structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving perspective on an elevated highway, moving toward a stunning futuristic skyline. The concrete barrier runs along the right side while the left side shows the underside of an overpass structure. The city ahead glows with neon lights from towering skyscrapers, and sparse traffic moves in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp passing under overpasses

events.description: turns left off the main highway onto the exit ramp, entering a more enclosed underpass area
slows down significantly while navigating the curved exit ramp beneath the highway structure

agents.ego_description: navigating the left exit ramp, passing under highway signage and concrete overpasses while slowing down

entered.detail: overhead metal gantry with directional signs and glowing green indicators
smooth concrete retaining wall with blue painted lower section

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes a left exit off the main highway, entering a semi-covered ramp system beneath the elevated highways. The environment becomes more enclosed with concrete walls on the left and massive support pillars. Overhead signage gantries span the road as the vehicle slows down navigating the curved underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with neon lighting

events.description: transitions from driving to walking, entering the covered pedestrian walkway with distinct orange neon lighting
passing under rows of orange neon strip lights creating a cyberpunk atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway, observing the neon-lit surroundings and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway forming a roof over the walkway with grid pattern
rows of orange and red neon tube lights running parallel to the walkway
large holographic advertising display showing animated content
palm tree in a concrete planter box on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to on-foot exploration as the character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway. The space is illuminated by striking orange neon strip lights overhead, with palm trees and digital billboards lining the path. The environment feels distinctly cyberpunk with the concrete ceiling overhead and glowing advertisements ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian plaza with digital billboards and storefronts

events.description: moves from the fully covered walkway to a more open plaza area with additional trees and wider pedestrian space

agents.ego_description: walking through the pedestrian plaza, passing digital billboards and palm trees while approaching a building entrance

notable_agents.action: person standing near the building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large circular metal ventilation grate on the building wall with radial pattern
illuminated shop windows and entrance areas along the building facade
dark entranceway to the building with glowing interior lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider pedestrian plaza with more breathing room. The camera passes a distinctive circular ventilation structure on the left building wall and approaches a building entrance ahead. Digital billboards continue to illuminate the scene from the right, while palm trees in planters line the walkway. The environment transitions from the enclosed covered walkway to a more open urban plaza space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed drive toward a neon skyline into an intimate, on-foot exploration of a cyberpunk pedestrian district. It begins from a first-person driving perspective on an elevated highway, moving past concrete barriers toward towering, glowing skyscrapers. As the vehicle takes a left exit, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting from the open road to a curved ramp system defined by massive support pillars and overhead signage gantries. The perspective then transitions to a walking pace through a covered pedestrian walkway, where the lighting shifts to striking orange neon strips and digital billboards beneath a heavy concrete ceiling. Finally, the scene opens into a wider urban plaza, passing a circular ventilation structure and palm trees in planters as the camera approaches a building entrance.
